verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.303-310. Chapter 30 'Upa Pada' covers Upa Pada computation (slokas 1-6) plus spouse/progeny/co-born predictions from Upa Pada, Lagna Pada, and derived houses. 43 slokas total, ~40 predictive claims. Conditions use planet_in_derived_house with derivation=upa_pada.

claims.claim: Upa Pada conjunct or aspected by benefic planet -> full happiness from progeny and spouse
Upa Pada in malefic sign or aspected/conjunct malefic -> ascetic, go without wife
Exception: if benefic aspect on upa pada or related malefic -> deprival of spouse will not come to pass
Sun exalted or in friendly sign -> treated as benefic; Sun in debilitation or enemy sign -> treated as malefic
2nd from Upa Pada is benefic sign or aspected/conjunct benefic -> good results for wife and sons
Planet in 2nd from UP in debilitation sign/Amsa or conjunct debilitated/malefic planet -> destruction of wife
Occupant of 2nd from UP in exaltation sign/Navamsa and aspected by another planet -> many charming and virtuous wives
Gemini as 2nd from Upa Pada -> many wives
Uparudha or 2nd therefrom occupied by own lord or if said lord in his other own house -> death of wife will be at advanced age
2nd lord from Uparudha in 2nd itself -> protect native from calamity; spouse will live to advanced age
Planet being constant indicator of wife (7th lord or Venus) in own house -> loss of wife only at later stage
Lord of Upapada or constant significator of wife in exaltation -> wife from noble family
Contrary: if he is debilitated -> reverse (wife from low family)
2nd from Upapada related to benefic -> wife will be beautiful, fortunate and virtuous
Saturn and Rahu in 2nd from Upa Pada -> native will lose wife on account of calumny or through death
Venus and Ketu in 2nd from Upapada -> wife troubled by disorder of blood, leucorrhoea etc.
Mercury with Ketu in 2nd from Upapada -> breakage of bones; Rahu, Saturn and Sun cause distress of bones
Mercury and Rahu in 2nd from Upapada -> stout-bodied wife
2nd from UP a sign of Mercury + tenanted by Mars and Saturn -> wife suffers nasal disorders
Sign of Mars as 2nd from UP occupied by Mars and Saturn -> nasal disorders to wife
Jupiter and Saturn in 2nd from UP -> disorders of ears/eyes to wife
Mercury and Mars in 2nd from UP other than own signs, or Rahu with Jupiter in 2nd -> wife dental disorders
Saturn and Rahu together in sign of Saturn as 2nd from UP -> lameness or windy disorders to wife
Exception: these evils will not come to pass if benefic conjunction or aspect (or from another benefic)
Methodology: effects can be deduced from natal ascendant, Lagna Pada, 7th from Upapada and lords thereof
Saturn and Moon together in 9th from one of the said places (sloka 23) -> no son at all
Sun, Jupiter and Rahu so placed -> number of sons
Moon so placed -> give a son while mixture of planets delays obtainment of son
Sun + Jupiter + Rahu conjunction in 9th -> son will be strong, valorous, greatly successful, destroy enemies
Mars and Saturn in 9th -> no son, or obtained by adoption or brother's son
Odd signs yield many sons, even signs cause only a few
Leo as Upapada aspected by Moon -> limited number of children
Virgo as Upapada -> many daughters
Rahu and Saturn in 3rd/11th from Lagna Pada -> destroy co-born (11th = elder brothers/sisters, 3rd = younger)
Venus in 3rd/11th from Lagna Pada -> abortion earlier (or 8th from natal ascendant, or from Lagnarudha)
Moon, Jupiter, Mercury and Mars in 3rd/11th from Lagna Pada -> many valorous co-born
Saturn and Mars in 3rd/11th from Lagna Pada or lend aspects -> younger and elder coborn respectively destroyed
Saturn alone in one of said houses -> native spared while co-born will die
Ketu in 3rd/11th from Lagna Pada -> abundant happiness from one's sisters
6th from Lagna Pada occupied by malefic and bereft of benefic conjunction/aspect -> native will be a thief
Rahu in 7th/12th from Lagna Pada or aspect one of said houses -> spiritual knowledge and be very fortunate
Mercury in Lagna Pada -> native will lord over whole country
Jupiter in Lagna Pada -> will make him a knower of all things; Venus = poet/speaker
Benefics occupy 2nd from Upapada or from Lagna Pada -> endowed with all kinds of wealth and be intelligent
Lord of 2nd from Upapada is in 2nd from natal ascendant and be with malefic planet -> surely become a thief
Rahu in 2nd from lord of 7th counted from Upapada -> long and projected teeth
Ketu so placed -> stammering
Saturn so placed -> one look ugly; mixed planets = mixed effects
